positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene. The main subject is a group of ornate, glowing bioluminescent flora emerging from a dense, mist-covered forest floor. The aesthetic is neo-Art Deco meets ethereal watercolor, featuring clean silhouettes of giant, stylized ferns and mushrooms. Use strong contrast between deep indigo and vibrant neon teal, accented by warm gold and emerald green glows. The composition must be central and visually balanced, designed as a seamless, repeatable pattern suitable for clothing prints. Cinematic soft volumetric lighting. Vector illustration quality, UHD, symmetry, highly detailed, maximalism.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, signature, logo, trademark, messy, poor anatomy, bad limbs, ugly, monochrome, grayscale, out of frame, cropped, amateur, cartoonish, grainy
